name: Lees Ferry Boat Launch (Colorado River)
notes: Glen Canyon NRA entrance fee; paved upstream ramp serves the 15-mile trout fishery to the dam.

name: Lees Ferry walk-in beach (Colorado River)
notes: Shore/wade water near the launch; barbless artificials only upstream of the ferry.

name: Phon D. Sutton Day Use Area (Lower Salt River)
notes: Tonto NF day-use fee ($8/vehicle); winter trout stocking point.

name: Blue Point Day Use Area (Lower Salt River)
notes: Tonto NF river access point near the Usery Pass Rd bridge; day-use fee.

name: Water Users Day Use Area (Lower Salt River)
notes: Uppermost Lower Salt access below Saguaro Lake; day-use fee.
